prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约14315→13224→5903→9890→11493，2023年受省控线大幅下降（理科一本线485分）影响出现异常低值，近两年位次逐步回升；2025年基准位次约11493名，较2024年后移约1600名，呈竞争加剧态势；该校在云南省理科组计划2021–2024年均为78人，2025年增至98人，2026年计划87人，较2025年缩招约11.2%，招生名额减少理论上降低竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属中上水平理工类院校；该校在声誉评价、抖音热度及投档异常记录中均未出现，声誉平稳，无明显舆情扰动；电气工程A级（全国前列）、动力工程及工程热物理A-，均为电力行业核心学科，与招生专业高度关联，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业2024年社会热度评为"高热推荐"，持续升温；云南省2026年高考总人数377900，较2025年（285688）大幅增长约32%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约229,000人，竞争基数显著扩大；该校位于河北省保定市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；在云南省招生占比约1.5%–2%，属常规跨省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11493、2026年缩招约11.2%、云南省物理类考生大幅增加约32%及电气类专业高热度的多重作用：缩招使位次前移，但考生激增与专业热度推高竞争，两者对冲后竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约10869名，区间10369–11369名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 14315 → 13224 → 5903 → 9890 → 11493. In 2023, due to a significant drop in the provincial control line (science first-tier line 485 points), an abnormally low value appeared. In the past two years, the ranking has gradually recovered. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11493, which is about 1600 places lower than 2024, indicating intensified competition. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Yunnan Province was 78 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 98 in 2025, and planned to be 87 in 2026, a reduction of about 11.2% compared to 2025. The reduction in enrollment places theoretically lowers the intensity of competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 75–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions. The university has no records in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing records, indicating a stable reputation and no obvious public opinion disturbances. Electrical Engineering is rated A (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, both core disciplines in the power industry, highly related to the enrollment majors, and strongly attractive to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major was rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024 social popularity, continuing to heat up. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Yunnan Province is 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (285,688). Estimated by the proportion in recent years, the number of physics category candidates is about 229,000, significantly expanding the competition base. The university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a local university in the province, so there is no local enrollment preference. The enrollment proportion in Yunnan Province is about 1.5%–2%, which is a normal cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11493, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 11.2%, the significant increase of about 32% in physics category candidates in Yunnan Province, and the high popularity of electrical majors: the enrollment reduction pushes the ranking forward, but the surge in candidates and major popularity increase competition. After offsetting, competition slightly intensifies. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10869, with a range of 10369–11369.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 10869, with a range of 10369–11369. Candidates with rankings above the lower limit of the range (10369) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 10800) are advised to focus on Tier 2 new engineering majors such as Computer Science, Energy Storage, and Hydrogen Energy. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (11369) or slightly lower can consider Tier 3 majors like Mechanical Engineering, Environmental Engineering, and Management as safety options. Due to the A-level discipline and high social popularity of electrical majors, their admission rankings are much higher than the university's baseline, so sufficient margin should be reserved.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第84名，属中上水平理工类院校，文科专业非其优势领域；该校声誉平稳，无负面舆情；抖音热度一般；无投档异常记录；电气工程A、动力工程及工程热物理A-均为工科，文科招生专业（法学、行政管理、外国语言文学类、社会工作）与优势学科无直接关联。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3705、2026年缩招25%、历史类考生大幅增加约32%及法学专业热度偏高的多重作用：缩招使位次前移，但考生激增与文科专业热度推高竞争，两者对冲后竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约3199名，区间2699–3699名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 3340 → 2594 → 3311 → 2900 → 3705, fluctuating within the 2600–3700 range, with a trend of moving backward in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3705, the highest (i.e., most difficult to enter) in the past five years; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Yunnan Province was 11 students each year from 2021 to 2024, dropping to 8 in 2025 (History Category), and planned 6 students in 2026, a 25% reduction compared to 2025, with enrollment quotas continuously shrinking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, a mid-to-upper level science and engineering institution, with liberal arts majors not being its strength; its reputation is stable with no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average; no abnormal filing records; Electrical Engineering rated A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics rated A-, both engineering disciplines, while liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Administrative Management, Foreign Languages and Literature, Social Work) have no direct connection with its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has relatively high social popularity (2024, with differentiation and wait-and-see attitude), attracting considerable attention from liberal arts candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan Province Gaokao is 377,900, with an estimated 148,900 liberal arts candidates based on recent years' proportions (an increase of about 32% from 112,406 in 2025), expanding the competition base; the university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a local university, with no local enrollment preference; its enrollment proportion in Yunnan Province's liberal arts is extremely small.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 3705, a 25% enrollment reduction in 2026, a significant increase of about 32% in liberal arts candidates, and the high popularity of the Law major: the enrollment reduction pushes the ranking forward, but the surge in candidates and the high popularity of liberal arts majors intensify competition, with the two factors offsetting each other and slightly increasing competition; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3199, with a range of 2699–3699.

- Social Work (Baoding Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 3199, with a range of 2699–3699. There are only 4 liberal arts enrollment majors; candidates with rankings above the lower limit of the range (2699) can aim for the Tier 1 Law major; those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 3200) are advised to focus on the Tier 2 Administrative Management major; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (3699) or slightly lower can consider Tier 3 Foreign Languages and Literature or Social Work as safety options. Due to the high social popularity of the Law major, its actual admission ranking is usually higher than the university's cutoff, so attention should be paid to the gradient.
